settings.code:
<style>

@media only screen and (min-width: 992px) {
.hero__content p {
  width: 25vw;
}
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 3000px) {

.wrapper--full {
max-width: 3000px;}
}
.hero__content h2 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 40px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: #fbfbfb;
  padding: 0px 0px;
}
.hero__content p {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: 400;
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: rgba(251, 251, 251, 0.8);
  padding: 0px 0px;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
</style>
<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    // Select the color selector fieldset
    const colorFieldset = document.querySelector(".radio__fieldset--swatches");
    if (!colorFieldset) return;

    // Find all visible radio swatches inside it
    const swatches = colorFieldset.querySelectorAll("radio-swatch");

    // If 0 or 1 swatches, hide the color selector fieldset
    if (swatches.length <= 1) {
      colorFieldset.style.display = "none";
    }
  });
</script>


<style>

@media only screen and (max-width: 749px) {
    .grid--mobile-slider {
        padding-left: 20px;
    }
    .grid--mobile-slider .grid-item {
        margin-right: 0px;
    }

}

.collection__products .grid-outer
 {
    padding: 10px 10px;
}

    .grid {
        gap: 5px;
    }

    .collection__products .product-item__info {
        padding-left: 0px;
    }
.custom-rating .star {
margin-top:-4px;
font-size: 14px !important;
margin-right: 2px !important;
}

.product-item--centered .product-information {
    text-align: left;
}
.product-information p {
padding-top:3px;
}
.product-information p, .product-information span{
	text-transform: uppercase !important;
	font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  	font-weightA: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  	font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    	letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
	font-size: 12px;

	font-size: 12px; 
font-weight: 100;
}

.sub {
	font-size: 10px !important;
	text-transform: uppercase;
	color:grey;
padding-bottom:3px;
}
</style><style>

@media (min-width: 763px) and (max-width: 3000px) {
.hero__content p {
  width: 25vw;
}
.wrapper--full, .hero__content, .wrapper--full-padded, .grid-outer, .grid__items-holder {
max-width: 90vw;
min-width: 90vw;
margin: 0 auto;
}


.index-hero .wrapper--full, .hero__video {
max-width: 100vw !important;
min-width: 100vw !important;
}

.index-hero {
padding-top: 0vh;
}

.grid-outer {
padding:0;
}
.frame__item{
height: 90vh;
}
}



.collection__products, .grid__items-holder {
padding-left:5vw;
padding-right:5vw;
}
.wrapper--full-padded {
padding:0;
}


@media (min-width: 3000px) {
.index-hero {
padding-top: 0vh;
}

.wrapper--full, .hero__content, .wrapper--full-padded, .grid-outer, .index-hero .wrapper--full, .hero__video  {
max-width: 3000px !important;
min-width: 3000px !important;
}

.collection__products {
padding-left: calc((100vw - 3000px) / 2);
}
}

.hero__content h2, .hero__content h1 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 20px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: #fbfbfb;
  padding: 0px 0px;
}

  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: 400;
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: rgba(251, 251, 251, 0.8);
  padding: 0px 0px;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

@media (min-width: 763px) {
#Rte--template--25036444860712__section_rich_text_gyHydy {
    --PT: 140px;}

height: 90vh !important;
}

.wrapper--full-padded .grid__items-holder{
margin: auto;
}
.collection__products, .grid__items-holder {
    padding-left: 0;
    padding-right: 0;
    margin: auto;

}

@media (max-width: 763px){

margin:0;}
.hero__content h2 {

  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: #fbfbfb;

}
}



</style>

<style>
.article-single p, .article-single li{
	text-transform: uppercase !important;
	font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  	font-weightA: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  	font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    	letter-spacing: 0; 
    	line-height: 2.5;
    	margin: .0em 0;
	align-items: center;
	font-size: 20px; 
	font-weight: 600;
}
.article-single p {
font-size:16px !important;
 text-indent: 0;
text-transform:none !important;
padding-bottom:1.6rem;
}




.article-single h1, .article-single h2, .article-single h3 {
	text-transform: uppercase !important;
	font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  	font-weightA: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  	font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    	letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    	line-height: 2;
    	margin: .0em 0;
    	text-transform: var(--FONT-UPPERCASE-HEADING, none);
	align-items: center;
	font-size: 20px; 
font-weight: 800;
padding-bottom:.8rem;
}

.article-single h2{
font-weight: 800;
font-size: 20px; 
}

.article-single h3{
font-weight: 700;
font-size: 16px; 
text-transform: none !important;
}

.article-single strong{
font-weight: 700;
}

.article__wrapper{
padding-top:0;}

.article__hero {
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
	justify-content:left;
	margin-left:5vw;
  max-width:90vw;
  width: 3000px;
  background-color: #3D6E2E;
  color: #fbfbfb;
  padding: var(--btn-top) 50px;
  border: 2px solid black;
}

.text-center {
    text-align: left;
}

.article__meta{
letter-spacing: .2rem;
color:white;
font-weight: 600;
}

.article__hero .wrapper {
padding-top: 20px;
padding-bottom: 20px;
}

.article-single .wrapper {
max-width:1000px;
width: calc(100vw - 100px);
margin:auto;
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 3000px) {
.article-single .wrapper {
max-width:1000px;
min-width: 1000px;
margin:auto;
}
}



</style>
<style>
/* pull quotes */
.article-single blockquote{
  margin:2.6rem 0 1rem;
  padding:0 0 0 22px;
  border-left:4px solid #3D6E2E;
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  font-weight:800;
  font-size:24px;
  line-height:1.45;
  text-transform:none;
  color:#111;
}
@media (max-width:762px){ .article-single blockquote{ font-size:20px; } }

/* in-article product cards */
.article-single .rc-card{
  display:flex; gap:20px; align-items:center;
  border:1px solid #e6e6e6; border-radius:12px;
  background:#fafafa; padding:18px;
  max-width:540px; margin:26px auto 30px;
  text-align:left;
}
.article-single .rc-card p{ text-indent:0 !important; padding-bottom:6px !important; margin:0 !important; }
.article-single .rc-card img{ width:150px; height:auto; display:block; border-radius:8px; }
.article-single .rc-card a{ border-bottom:none; }
.article-single .rc-card .rc-card-btn{
  display:inline-block; background:#3D6E2E; color:#fff;
  padding:10px 20px; border-radius:6px; text-decoration:none;
  font-weight:700; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.06em; text-transform:uppercase;
  transition: background-color .2s ease-in-out;
}
.article-single .rc-card .rc-card-btn:hover{ background:#0a64c8; }
@media (max-width:600px){
  .article-single .rc-card{ flex-direction:column; text-align:center; }
  .article-single .rc-card p{ text-align:center; }
}
</style>

settings.code:
Newest Release

The latest drop of exclusive, bold designs in golf wall art & lifestyle apparel.

Golf

Performance golf posters built for athletes — golf posters, golf posters, golf posters & shirts.

Lifestlye

Graphic tees & hoodies inspired by golf culture — everyday comfort with bold designs.

Posters

Motivational golf posters — inspirational wall art for athletes and training spaces.

custom_css: @media only screen and (min-width: 750px) {.grid__heading-holder--inline .grid__heading-text {margin: 0; padding: 0; width: auto; flex: 0 1 100%;}}
.grid__heading-holder {position: relative; display: block; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 0; margin: 0 0 var(--gutter); color: var(--text);}

.grid__heading {text-align: left; font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE); font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT); font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK); width: 100%; color: #000; font-size: 20px; border-bottom: 1px black solid; padding-bottom: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 20px;}
